About Me

The engineer behind
the systems ⚙️

Hey! I'm Bhanu Pratap Singh, a Senior Backend Engineer based in Sector 73, Noida with 5+ years of experience designing and maintaining scalable, high-performance back-end infrastructure.

I specialise in Node.js, Microservices, GraphQL, and AWS. I started at Adsever Media and now work at Appinventiv Technologies — currently contributing to the large-scale cinema platform for PVR INOX.

I care deeply about system design, API efficiency, database performance, and clean architecture — turning complex back-end challenges into reliable, maintainable solutions.

Projects

Systems I've
designed & shipped 🚀

PROJECT 01 · DELIVERED
JAKTIV — Social Networking for Hunters

Robust social platform for hunters to connect, share, and trade. Built feed algorithms inspired by Instagram's architecture, real-time chat microservices, Firebase notifications, and Stripe marketplace payments.

Node.jsMicroservicesMongoDBFirebaseStripe
✓ Delivered · 1.2 years
PROJECT 02 · DELIVERED
Eval Sports — Athletic Evaluation Platform

Platform for high school athletic departments to track performance. Designed GraphQL schemas, used AWS Cognito for auth, DynamoDB for low-latency storage, Lambda for serverless compute, and SNS for notifications.

GraphQLAWS CognitoDynamoDBLambdaSNS
✓ Delivered · 1.5 years
PROJECT 03 · CURRENTLY WORKING
PVR-INOX Limited — Movie & Food Booking App

Large-scale cinema management and ticket booking platform. Designing and optimizing Node.js microservices, enhancing API performance, integrating third-party services, and ensuring secure, scalable data flows across the full PVR INOX ecosystem.

Node.jsMicroservicesREST APIsPostgreSQLRedis
